commands: vite dedupe && cat package.json # should dedupe dependencies
vite dedupe --check && cat package.json # should check if deduplication would make changes
vite ddp -- --loglevel=warn && cat package.json # support pass through arguments
json-edit package.json '_.dependencies = {}' && cat package.json && vite dedupe --check # should check fails because no dependencies
vite dedupe && cat package.json && vite dedupe --check # should dedupe fix the change by removing the dependencies
